mapper.select: SELECT category_id AS categoryId, parent_id AS parentId, name, sort FROM t_material_category ORDER BY sort ASC, category_id ASC
SELECT category_id AS categoryId, parent_id AS parentId, name, sort FROM t_material_category WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_material_category
parent_id = #{parentId},
name = #{name},
sort = #{sort},
WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
